title: clickhouse-operator values
description: Dependency-wrapper for the upstream clickhouse-operator-helm chart (aliased to `operator`). Values pass through under `operator`.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values propagated to the upstream subchart.

operator.title: Upstream clickhouse-operator-helm passthrough
operator.description: Values forwarded to the upstream clickhouse-operator-helm subchart (webhook, certManager, crd, manager, rbac, etc.).
